basics.description: Deploy a network-isolated **Windows workstation** for the Oracle to Azure Database for PostgreSQL schema conversion feature. The VM runs Visual Studio Code with the Microsoft PostgreSQL extension inside your virtual network, reached privately over Azure Bastion (RDP). [Learn more](https://github.com/Balunywa/azure-oracle-pg-migrator).

basics.name: adminUsername
basics.label: Administrator username
basics.toolTip: The local administrator account, also used as the RDP login.

basics.name: adminPassword
basics.toolTip: RDP login password. Must meet Windows complexity rules (12-123 chars, 3 of: lowercase, uppercase, digit, symbol).

constraints.validationMessage: Use 12-123 characters with at least one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, and one digit.

elements.name: vmSize
elements.label: Virtual machine size
elements.toolTip: Size of the workstation VM. D4s_v5 is enough for Visual Studio Code on Windows.

elements.name: foundryEndpoint
elements.label: Microsoft Foundry endpoint
elements.toolTip: Optional. https://<resource>.openai.azure.com. The PostgreSQL extension also prompts for this.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a URL starting with https:// or leave blank.

elements.name: foundryDeployment
elements.label: Foundry deployment name
elements.toolTip: The model deployment name used for the conversion.
